query:
SELECT a.id, a.name, a.email, c.name as mentor_nome, t.name as turma, a.cadastradoPorAdmin, a.createdAt
FROM alunos a
LEFT JOIN consultors c ON c.id = a.consultorId
LEFT JOIN turmas t ON t.id = a.turmaId
WHERE a.isActive = 1 AND a.bypassOnboarding = 1
ORDER BY a.name;
command:

LEFT JOIN turmas t ON t.id = a.turmaId
WHERE a.isActive = 1 AND a.bypassOnboarding = 1
